summary: Same persistent issues from reviews #14-16 remain unfixed — the timezone bug, missing tabIndex on tabpanels, missing aria-label on tablist, and deep-glow reduced-motion gap. These are all small fixes that keep getting flagged. New observation: confetti layer lacks reduced-motion handling. Code quality is solid but the accessibility debt is real.

suggestions.title: Header greeting still uses viewer's local timezone — flagged since #15
suggestions.description: App.jsx: `const currentHour = new Date().getHours()`. The window sky was fixed to use America/Los_Angeles, but the greeting ('Good morning/afternoon/evening') still uses the viewer's local clock. A viewer in Tokyo sees 'Good evening' when LA is morning. Use the same Intl.DateTimeFormat approach as WindowElement.

suggestions.title: deep-glow keyframe missing from prefers-reduced-motion — flagged since #15
suggestions.description: Office.css reduced-motion block nullifies bob, manager-wobble, wander-*, etc. But `deep-glow` (used by .char--deep-work) is not listed. It pulses continuously — exactly the kind of animation that triggers vestibular issues. Add `@keyframes deep-glow { from {} to {} }` inside the reduced-motion block.

suggestions.title: tabpanel divs still missing tabIndex={0} — flagged since #14
suggestions.description: App.jsx: both tabpanel divs (id='tabpanel-office' and 'tabpanel-dashboard') lack tabIndex. Per WAI-ARIA 1.1, tabpanels should have tabIndex={0} so keyboard users can navigate into panel content after tab switch.

suggestions.title: Tab container role='tablist' still missing aria-label — flagged since #14
suggestions.description: App.jsx: the div with role='tablist' has no aria-label. Screen readers announce 'tab list' with no context. Add aria-label='View selector' or similar.

suggestions.title: Confetti layer has no reduced-motion handling — NEW
suggestions.description: The confetti burst (30 animated spans) plays unconditionally. Users with prefers-reduced-motion should not see rapidly flying particles. Add a CSS rule or JS check to suppress confetti when reduced motion is preferred.

suggestions.title: Bloberto speech bubble has no keyboard/focus trigger — flagged since #15
suggestions.description: The manager character shows speech bubbles on mouseenter only. Keyboard-only users can never trigger quotes. Add tabIndex={0} and onFocus/onBlur handlers.

suggestions.title: Character tooltips still hover-only — flagged since #14
suggestions.description: Characters with data-tooltip show info via CSS ::after on hover. No keyboard equivalent exists. Add tabIndex={0} and focus/blur handlers.

suggestions.title: Activity log relative timestamps never update — flagged since #14
suggestions.description: getRelativeTime() is called at render time only. If the page stays open, '2m ago' never ticks to '5m ago'. Add a tick counter updated every 60s.

suggestions.title: DEFAULT_ROSTER still in Office.jsx instead of constants.js — flagged since #15
suggestions.description: ROLE_EMOJIS and ROLE_COLORS were moved to utils/constants.js. DEFAULT_ROSTER was not. Move it for consistency.

suggestions.title: Dead CSS still in App.css — .hire-form*, .hq-badge, .btn-danger — flagged since #14
suggestions.description: App.css still contains .hire-form-wrapper, .hire-form-title, .hire-form, .hq-badge, .btn-danger. None exist in App.jsx. Four reviews now. Delete them.

suggestions.title: .progress-bar-inner in App.css reduced-motion targets wrong class — flagged since #15
suggestions.description: App.css reduced-motion block references .progress-bar-inner but the actual class is .progress-bar-fill. The rule targets nothing.

suggestions.title: No keyboard shortcut discovery — flagged since #14
suggestions.description: The 1/2 keyboard shortcuts for tab switching have no discovery path. Add title attributes to tab buttons.
